name: Minimal Header
description: Slim header with centered content below. Used for checkout flows, focused task pages.

header.content: Back arrow icon + brand link, centered
header.note: Slim header with centered brand. Minimal — no nav links.
header.button_sizing: Buttons in the header use compact sizing: py-1.5 px-3 text-sm (~32px tall). The header is a tight 52px bar — default d-interactive padding is too large here.

content_wrapper.note: Centered column for focused content. Checkout forms, task pages.

guidance.shell_spacing: Minimal-header owns the narrow work-column rhythm and the body inset. Route content should fill the provided centered column rather than layering an extra max-width wrapper on top.

code.imports: Target-specific imports vary. Translate the internal_layout contract into your framework's compact header bar and single scrollable body region.
code.example: MinimalHeaderShell(root) -> Header(title, minimal actions) + Body(shared insets, sole scroll container)
